spec.goal: Measure and track user reaction times over time to benchmark and improve reflexes.
spec.target_user: Adults who want to benchmark and improve their reflexes

screens.name: Home
screens.description: Landing screen with a primary call-to-action to start a recorded reflex test, plus a quick unrecorded test option and entry point to history.

screens.name: Reflex Test
screens.description: Core test game screen showing a stimulus (color change/shape) and capturing the user's tap latency across multiple trials, then displaying the result.

screens.name: Result
screens.description: Post-test summary showing average reaction time, best trial, and option to save (if recorded) or retry.

screens.name: History
screens.description: Dashboard listing past ReflexResult entries with a trend chart and per-session details.

screens.name: Sign In
screens.description: Authentication screen for sign in and sign up to sync results to the user's account.

features: Run a recorded reflex test with multiple trials
View reaction time history with trend visualization
spec.style_notes: Polished, high-fidelity UI with clean animations and dark mode friendly palette; minimal, focused layouts emphasizing the test experience.
